name: Tat Hong Equipment Service Co., Ltd.
summary: Tat Hong Equipment Service Co., Ltd. provides tower crane services in the People's Republic of China. It offers consultation, technical design, commissioning, construction, and after-sales services to construction contractors in infrastructure, energy, commercial, and residential sectors. As of December 20, 2020, the company owned a fleet of 1,008 tower cranes. The company was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Shanghai, China. Tat Hong Equipment Service Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Tat Hong Equipment (China) Pte. Ltd.
